name: Pendant of Nostalgia
descs:
Combat Start: a random ally gains 3 [Breath] Potency. (Prioritizes Identities with Attack Skills that gain [Breath] Counts)

Prioritizes allies with Gloom Affinity Attack Skills; those allies gain 3 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count.

Combat Start: a random ally gains 4 [Breath] Potency. (Prioritizes Identities with Attack Skills that gain [Breath] Counts)

Prioritizes allies with Gloom Affinity Attack Skills; those allies gain 4 [Breath] Potency and +3 [Breath] Count.

Combat Start: two random allies gain 4 [Breath] Potency. (Prioritizes Identities with Attack Skills that gain [Breath] Counts)

Prioritizes allies with Gloom Affinity Attack Skills; those allies gain 4 [Breath] Potency and +3 [Breath] Count.
